title: habenaria dryadum
intro: Habenaria dryadum, also known as the dryad orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Habenaria dryadum are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and powdered, and then used in decoctions or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
